_comment: Canonical item registry. Every item referenced by resource_nodes, recipes, loot tables, mob drops, and shop inventories lives here. Items are referenced by id from all other data files. Phase 1 seeds the basic materials; later phases will add consumables, components, ammo, and equipment.

items.name: Stick
items.description: A small stick. Floor pickup, found everywhere. Combine with stones to make a Stone Axe or Stone Pickaxe.

items.name: Stone
items.description: A loose stone. Floor pickup, found everywhere. Combine with a stick to make a Stone Axe or Stone Pickaxe.

items.name: Withered Branch
items.description: A dry, twisted branch. Chopped from trees in any biome. Basic crafting ingredient.

items.name: Raw Meat
items.description: Uncooked flesh from a beast. Dropped by predatory mobs. Cook at a Cooking Table to make Cooked Meat.

items.name: Kelp Fibre
items.description: Slimy fibrous strands from Neon Bogs kelp. Used in crafting bandages and rope items.

items.name: Ironwood Bark
items.description: Bark stripped from an ironwood tree. Metallic and dense. Component for reinforced tools.

items.name: Living Metal Sample
items.description: A chunk of living metal harvested from Ironwood. Pulses faintly. Rare crafting component.

items.name: Rusted Scrap
items.description: Crumbling metal bits. Salvage material for weapon/armor recipes.

items.name: Iron Ore
items.description: A chunk of iron-bearing stone. Mined from iron outcrops. Used in iron-tier crafting.

items.name: Copper Ore
items.description: A greenish copper ore. Mined from copper outcrops. Used in copper-tier crafting.

items.name: Starmetal Ore
items.description: A glittering starmetal ore. Mined from starmetal outcrops. Used in starmetal-tier crafting.

items.name: Teal Crystal
items.description: A pale teal crystal. Found in Neon Bogs geode nodes. Used in tech crafting.

items.name: Void Shard
items.description: A jagged black shard that drinks the light. Found in Stormspire crystal nodes. Used in rift-related crafting.

items.name: Ember Crystal
items.description: A warm crystal that radiates heat. Found in Toxin Marshes geode nodes. Used in starmetal-tier crafting.

items.name: Bandage
items.description: Heals 30 HP on use. Craftable from withered_branch at L1.

items.name: Mana Potion
items.description: Restores 25 MP on use. v0.6.0 consumable.

items.name: Cooked Meat
items.description: Heals 15 HP and grants +1 attack for 3 turns on use. v0.6.0 consumable.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: Heals 10 HP on use. Will cure status effects when those land in v0.6.0+. v0.6.0 consumable.
